category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU utilities for networking; GNU official page describes Inetutils as common network programs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is inetutils; official GNU page title is Inetutils and Savannah project name is GNU Networking Utilities.
docs_sources: GNU Inetutils official page links an online manual; the GNU manual documents the networking utilities.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; GNU Savannah project page lists Inetutils as official GNU software with a Git Repository, and Savannah's official Git URL pattern is https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/<group>.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists ftp, telnet, ping, traceroute, syslogd, and related tools; official GNU page lists the same network clients, servers, and admin tools.
